name: NetJobs Group AB (publ)
summary: NetJobs Group AB (publ) provides specific career sites. It owns and operates 42 job sites in Sweden, Germany, Norway, Finland, and Denmark. The company was formerly known as Svensk Internetrekrytering AB and changed its name to NetJobs Group AB (publ) in March 2011. NetJobs Group AB (publ) was founded in 2004 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
